scripts.clean:examples: rm -rf outputs/file-vault outputs/game-platform outputs/ent outputs/sqlmodel outputs/zod outputs/dbml outputs/protobuf
scripts.compile-examples: pnpm run clean:examples && sh -c 'pnpm run compile-example:file-vault & p1=$!; pnpm run compile-example:game-platform & p2=$!; wait $p1; s1=$?; wait $p2; s2=$?; exit $((s1 || s2))' && pnpm run format-examples
scripts.compile-examples:ent: rm -rf outputs/file-vault/ent outputs/game-platform/ent && sh -c 'tsp compile examples/file-vault --emit @qninhdt/typespec-ent & p1=$!; tsp compile examples/game-platform --emit @qninhdt/typespec-ent & p2=$!; wait $p1; s1=$?; wait $p2; s2=$?; exit $((s1 || s2))' && pnpm run format-examples:ent
scripts.compile-examples:sqlmodel: rm -rf outputs/file-vault/sqlmodel outputs/game-platform/sqlmodel && sh -c 'tsp compile examples/file-vault --emit @qninhdt/typespec-sqlmodel & p1=$!; tsp compile examples/game-platform --emit @qninhdt/typespec-sqlmodel & p2=$!; wait $p1; s1=$?; wait $p2; s2=$?; exit $((s1 || s2))' && pnpm run format-examples:sqlmodel
scripts.compile-examples:zod: rm -rf outputs/file-vault/zod outputs/game-platform/zod && sh -c 'tsp compile examples/file-vault --emit @qninhdt/typespec-zod & p1=$!; tsp compile examples/game-platform --emit @qninhdt/typespec-zod & p2=$!; wait $p1; s1=$?; wait $p2; s2=$?; exit $((s1 || s2))' && pnpm run format-examples:zod
scripts.compile-examples:dbml: rm -rf outputs/file-vault/dbml outputs/game-platform/dbml && sh -c 'tsp compile examples/file-vault --emit @qninhdt/typespec-dbml & p1=$!; tsp compile examples/game-platform --emit @qninhdt/typespec-dbml & p2=$!; wait $p1; s1=$?; wait $p2; s2=$?; exit $((s1 || s2))'
scripts.compile-examples:protobuf: rm -rf outputs/file-vault/protobuf outputs/game-platform/protobuf && tsp compile examples/file-vault --emit @typespec/protobuf
scripts.format-examples: pnpm run format-examples:ent && pnpm run format-examples:sqlmodel && pnpm run format-examples:zod
scripts.validate-examples:ent: sh -c 'cd outputs/file-vault/ent && go build -mod=mod ./...' && sh -c 'cd outputs/game-platform/ent && go build -mod=mod ./...'
scripts.validate-examples:zod: pnpm --dir outputs/file-vault/zod exec tsc -p tsconfig.json && pnpm --dir outputs/game-platform/zod exec tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.validate-examples:protobuf: sh -c 'protos="$(find outputs/file-vault/protobuf -name "*.proto" | sort)"; test -n "$protos" && protoc -I outputs/file-vault/protobuf --descriptor_set_out=/tmp/file-vault.pb $protos'
scripts.validate-examples: pnpm run validate-examples:ent && pnpm run validate-examples:sqlmodel && pnpm run validate-examples:zod && pnpm run validate-examples:protobuf
